text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that allows computers to understand images and videos. One common use is image recognition, where a computer can identify objects like cats or cars in a photo. Another important task is object detection, which not only recognizes objects but also finds their exact location. These technologies have many real-world applications. For example, self-driving cars use computer vision to detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles to drive safely. It is also used in security cameras and medical imaging to help diagnose diseases. As technology improves, computer vision will continue to change how machines see the world around them.
